TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Walter_Berry, title = Walter_Berry, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walter_Berry} }

S.FORM: Walter Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 5, Walter Berry, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Walter Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 5, Walter Berry, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: walter βerrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, walter βerrj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
